body:
I renamed and reorganized some of the `buildkite` tests. The goal is to highlight the purpose of the test.

I un-soft-failed the tests that seem to be working more reliably. Lets see if thats true. 

I listed below the full set of tests that are commented out because they permanently fail or time out. Out of those:
- Prognostic EDMF Rico 2M - Lets bring it back after we are done with 2M/P3 work. I think it's close.
- Moist baroclininc wave with sources - Should be fixed.  
- LES ISDAC - Not sure if anyone is working on it. Ok to leave commented out?
- Baroclininc wave with AMD - Maybe ok to leave out? We have another test with AMD.
- NOGW GPU test - There is something wrong with the setup. Should be fixed or deleted.
- Restart tests - Is anyone working on it?
- Autodiff tests - Is that still a priority? Can we delete them for now?
title: Cleanup in buildkite pipeline

body: Glib_jll was added to fix CI from breaking when loading Makie. This PR (https://github.com/JuliaPackaging/Yggdrasil/pull/13382) in Yggdrasil fixes it.
title: Remove Glib_jll from dependencies
